bsc.label: Binance Alpha 2.0 Proxy/Custody
bsc.evidence: 2026-06-29 Phalcon Invocation Flow review: CLO/RAVE buy traces show Router approving and depositing Alpha tokens to Binance Deposit/Proxy-Custody via 0xfed29397; KGEN sell trace shows Router pulling tokens from the same custody path via 0x5d7208c3. Promoted from suspect after nested call evidence.

bsc.label: Binance Alpha 2.0 Router
bsc.evidence: 2026-06-29 Phalcon Invocation Flow review: CLO/KGEN/RAVE traces show direct Alpha Router/Binance Wallet Proxy entry, delegatecall dispatch, DEX Router swap call, and custody deposit/pull interaction. Promoted from suspect after nested call evidence.

bsc.label: Binance DEX Router
bsc.evidence: 2026-06-29 Phalcon Invocation Flow review: CLO/RAVE/KGEN traces show this address as the downstream Binance DEX Router swap executor, including depth-2 swap call 0x810c705b.
